title: mentha stolonifera
intro: Mentha stolonifera, also known as Japanese peppermint or wild mint, is a perennial plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mentha stolonifera include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and relieve headaches, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve mental clarity. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional medicine and culinary applications.
